title: Assessment
description: The wire contract a Grader emits for one grading run. An Assessment is an absolute statement about the project's current state (no baseline/delta) and carries no pass/fail self-veto — the goal gate decides that by policy. NOTE: one cross-field rule is NOT expressible in JSON Schema and is enforced by Newton: every observations[].dimension MUST appear in scores[].dimension (a scored dimension may have zero observations, but never the reverse).

schema_version.description: Contract version. Bumped only on a breaking change to this shape.

grader.description: Stable name of the Grader that produced this Assessment. Maps to EvalRun.source.

scope.description: The portfolio level this Assessment evaluates.

scope_id.description: Identifier of the scoped entity (e.g. the Component or Repo id).

evaluated_at.description: When the grading run was performed.

overall_score.description: Grader-reported holistic progress toward the Objective. NOT a mandated aggregation of scores[] — the Grader owns its weighting.

verdict.description: The Grader's advisory recommendation. Ordered worst→best in reverse: reject < request_changes < approve_with_comments < approve. Advisory only — the goal gate owns the binding decision.

summary.description: One-paragraph human-readable summary of the Assessment.

scores.description: Per-dimension scalar layer. Persisted as Grade rows. At least one dimension must be scored.

observations.description: The text-gradient: localized, actionable critiques. Reconciled into durable Findings. May be empty (a clean Assessment).

extensions.description: Optional escape hatch for domain-specific payloads (e.g. a security grader's vulnerability counts). Opaque to the loop; not interpreted by Newton.

dimension.description: The qualitative axis graded. Unique within an Assessment.

rationale.description: One line on why this number.

observation.description: One unit of the text-gradient. The directional triple (observation + why_it_matters + recommended_action) is mandatory: without the action it is a complaint, not a gradient. Deliberately has NO id — identity is assigned by Newton via Reconciliation.

dimension.description: The axis this critique belongs to. MUST match one of scores[].dimension (enforced by Newton).

why_it_matters.description: WHY it matters — sharpens the direction.

recommended_action.description: The DIRECTION — what to change. This is the gradient vector.

location.description: Where the critique applies. Optional and flexible: may be coarse or omitted for non-local (e.g. architectural) critiques.

range.description: A line range (e.g. "L40-L78") or other locator within the path.

symbol.description: A named symbol/module the critique targets.

confidence.description: The Grader's certainty in this Observation.
